name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_uvw_srapc_special_projects
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_srapc_special_projects' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`created` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`updated` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date Submitted` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date Approved/Rejected` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Proposed Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Finalisation Handover completed?` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - SD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - SD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - Variation Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Estimates - Variation Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Planning - % Completed To Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Planning - Estimated Timeframe` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Practical Completion - PC Notification Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Practical Completion - Handover Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`created` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`updated` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date Received` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date Submitted` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date Approved/Rejected` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Proposed Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Finalisation Handover completed?` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - SD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - SD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - Construction Proposal Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - Construction Proposal Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - Variation Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Estimates - Variation Submission Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Planning - % Completed To Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Planning - Estimated Timeframe` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Practical Completion - PC Notification Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Practical Completion - Handover Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'created|updated|Date Received|Date Submitted|Date Approved/Rejected|Proposed Due Date|Finalisation Handover completed?|Estimates - HLCE Due Date|Estimates - HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - SD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - SD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - 50% CD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - 100% CD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - 20% DD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - 50% DD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Due Date|Estimates - 80% DD HLCE Submission Date|Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Due Date|Estimates - 100% DD Construction Proposal Submission Date|Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Due Date|Estimates - AFC Construction Proposal Submission Date|Estimates - Construction Proposal Due Date|Estimates - Construction Proposal Submission Date|Estimates - Variation Due Date|Estimates - Variation Submission Date|Planning - % Completed To Date|Planning - Estimated Timeframe|Practical Completion - PC Notification Date|Practical Completion - Handover Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`uvw_srapc_special_projects`
